name: Butterscotch Bars #2
recipeInstructions:
1. In the top of a double boiler over hot water, combine 1/4 cup Butter Flavor Crisco, Butterscotch Chips, Peanut butter, and Milk. Stir occasionally until the mixture is melted and smooth.
2. In a large bowl, combine Graham cracker crumbs and 1 cup chopped nuts. Pour the butterscotch mixture over the crumbs. Stir until combined.
3. Spread the mixture in an ungreased 9x9x2 inch pan. (If a 9x9x2 inch pan is not available, form a 9x9x2 inch tray by lining a 13x9x2 inch pan with aluminum foil.) Refrigerate until firm. Cut into bars measuring 3/4 x 1 3/4 inches.
4. In the top of another double boiler over hot water, combine Chocolate Chips and 3 tablespoons Butter Flavor Crisco. Stir occasionally until the chocolate melts.
5. Place one bar at a time in the melted chocolate. Turn with a fork. Lift from the chocolate on the fork. Allow excess to drip off. Place on a paper-lined baking sheet. Sprinkle the top with finely chopped peanuts. Return to the refrigerator to harden the chocolate. Makes 5 1/5 to 6 dozen bars.
